title: platanus orientalis var. hispanica
intro: Platanus orientalis var. hispanica, also known as the Oriental Plane or Hispánico, is a variety of the Oriental Plane tree, native to the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Europe. The bark and leaves of this plant have been traditionally used in herbal medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Platanus orientalis var. hispanica are thought to include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions.
